violations.text: The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 01/17/2024

The floor in the back storage room is in poor repair (tiles cracked/chipped). Per the PIC, replacement tiles are on hand, waiting for installation. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2024
